He is incredibly knowledgeable, experienced, and thorough, bringing a high level of integrity to what he does. I expected the process of creating a will and thinking through everything to be daunting, however Jeremy ensured that we covered it all and guided us through our different options, patiently answering all of our questions from the beginning. He was very kind and made the process painless. Would highly recommend.

You will be charged $50 when you make your consultation appointment and this $50 is non-refundable, even if you decide not to hire them!! So you are paying them to have an appointment with them!! Unbelievable!! They claim it's for administration fees!! What a scam. Please save yourself the headache, find a different attorney.
